name: Elsamitrucin
description: The cytostatic agent Elsamitrucin is a new fermentation product active in a variety of in vivo tumor models of murine and human origin. (PMID: 8150873)
mechanismOfAction: Elsamitrucin induces single strand breaks in DNA and inhibits topoisomerase I and II, enzymes that play an important role in DNA replication.

interactions.name: Trastuzumab
interactions.description: Trastuzumab may increase the cardiotoxic activities of Elsamitrucin.

interactions.name: Paclitaxel
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Paclitaxel is combined with Elsamitrucin.

interactions.name: Docetaxel
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Docetaxel is combined with Elsamitrucin.

interactions.name: Cabazitaxel
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Cabazitaxel is combined with Elsamitrucin.

interactions.description: Digoxin may decrease the cardiotoxic activities of Elsamitrucin.
